_doc: Measurement boundary — atlas constants outside functor F's algebraic image. Declarative companion to config/invariants.json. Axis D from R24+27 witness closure roadmap.

boundary_principle.F_scope: F : C_atlas_algebraic → C_engine preserves foundation atoms + semiring derivations + transcendental approximations
boundary_principle.out_of_scope: pure empirical measurements — values obtained from physical experiment or statistical threshold, not derived from foundation
boundary_principle.reason: F is a structure-preserving map. Measurement inputs are data, not structure. Including them would make F a data adapter, breaking the faithful functor property.

entropy_bound.foundation_derivation_attempts: none found — not expressible as foundation-atom semiring combination within reasonable error tolerance
entropy_bound.handling: external data adapter required for engine consumption; F image excludes this atom by design

alpha_coupling.foundation_derivation_attempts: ln(2) / 2^5.5 ≈ 0.0153 (9.4% error, R24+17) — derivable via transcendental operation with bounded error, borderline case
alpha_coupling.classification_decision: INCLUDED in F's transcendental tier if approximation tolerance accepted; EXCLUDED if exact-equality required
alpha_coupling.current_stance: borderline — counted as transcendental-approximate in R24+17 taxonomy, but strictness level not yet formally gated

boundary_policy.strict_mode: F covers only exact algebraic derivations. alpha_coupling excluded, entropy_bound excluded.
boundary_policy.lenient_mode: F covers exact + transcendental within ~10% error. alpha_coupling included, entropy_bound excluded.
boundary_policy.default_stance: lenient (per R24+17 taxonomy). Explicit policy can be set via this file if future enforcement requires choice.
boundary_policy.policy_gate_future: A scanner could read .default_stance and enforce matching exclusion behavior in P37/P39/etc.

adapter_design_notes.if_engine_needs_measurement_data: Do NOT extend F to cover measurement atoms. Instead add a separate data adapter (e.g. tool/_n6_measurement_adapter) that reads current measured values from a trusted source and writes them into a dedicated reports/ location. Engine claims can then consume those reports.
adapter_design_notes.separation_rationale: Conflating derivation and measurement in F would break the 'same HEAD → same verdict' invariant (P27 claim cmd purity) since measurement values can change between runs without code change.
adapter_design_notes.not_implemented: No adapter currently exists. Engine's content scanners already handle numeric claims via config files — measurement integration would follow that pattern.

enforcement_future.P46_candidate: boundary_policy enforcement — if strict_mode, alpha_coupling tagged 'excluded' in invariants.json tier_coverage.consciousness_IIT
enforcement_future.note: Not yet a gate. Axis D from R24+27 witness closure completed in document form.
